prompt: Phase 5 (Issue Hierarchy) is now complete. Please update your expertise file to reflect the current state. (4) Tests: 284 total, 1101 assertions, 99.31% coverage. (5) Error code HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT (exit 12) already existed. No CLI changes. Stage is now: Phase 5 complete, ready for Phase 6 (blockages).
